title: Deliciously Savory Russian Beef Pilaf
description: A winey and snappy Russian dish featuring seasoned rice vinegar, this quick-fix pilaf is a Mediterranean-friendly delight
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute
Add the uncooked white rice to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly
Add the beef broth, rice vinegar, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper to the skillet
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid is absorbed
